name: catalyst
description: Private marketplace for Catalyst Claude Code plugins (SDLC framework, workflow tooling, and related multi-agent patterns)

plugins.name: catalyst-sdlc-framework
plugins.description: Multi-agent SDLC framework with Cognitive Council deliberation and task decomposition patterns for structured feature development

plugins.name: ticket-workflows
plugins.description: Structured ticket workflow with progressive context, beads integration, quality gates, and per-stage agents (dev, review, QA, coverage)

plugins.name: catalyst-meta
plugins.description: Catalyst meta-plugin: global agents, slash commands, and session hooks (workstream briefing, pre/post-compact, git-guard). Designed to be kept always-enabled.
